title: Mario Paint Composer - Slider (April Fools)
description:
So I was a little late with this one between having work and riding my bike into a phone pole, only to find that axelrod had already beaten me to the punch but oh well. Sadly I didn't have the time to ACTUALLY touch it up and fix the flower chords and percussion errors and whatnot, but I saw an opportunity and took it.

Special thanks to whoever's responsible for this gem: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zA49EMUToqs
